CustomField.description: Formula expression to evaluate dynamically at runtime using Formula.builder(). Used when Transformation_Type__c = 'FORMULA'. Supports standard Salesforce formula syntax. Example: IF(ISBLANK({!ETM_Role__c}), {!Routing_Method__c}, 'MQL to ETM')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter a Salesforce formula expression. Use {!FieldName} syntax to reference source record fields. Example: IF(ISBLANK({!ETM_Role__c}), {!Routing_Method__c}, 'MQL to ETM')
CustomField.label: Formula Expression
